name: Red Wolf
conservationEfforts: USFWS Alligator River National Wildlife Refuge maintains the only wild population. Captive breeding program holds about 250 wolves in 43 facilities.
description: Once found throughout the southeastern United States, the red wolf was declared extinct in the wild in 1980 before being reintroduced to North Carolina in 1987. It remains critically endangered with fewer than 20 wild individuals.
